purpose: Evaluation-only families and related-content quarantine rules for exact, translated and semantic contamination control.
global_rules: Exclude every direct evaluation source from all candidate-training shards.
Run exact normalized hash matching before tokenization.
Run semantic and translation-aware matching against statements, solutions and formalizations.
Keep validation and test splits immutable; never use test feedback as supervised training data.
Record every removal by source ID, holdout group, matcher version and artifact hash.

groups.title: DeepMind mathematics_dataset
groups.quarantine: All canonical and regenerated instances produced with evaluation seeds or templates.

groups.title: GSM8K family
groups.quarantine: Questions, rationales, answers, paraphrases, translations and chain-of-thought derivatives.

groups.title: MATH benchmark family
groups.quarantine: Canonical problems and solutions plus scraped, reformatted, translated or synthetic variants.

groups.title: miniF2F v1 family
groups.quarantine: Formal statements, proofs, informal originals and equivalent translations across Lean, Metamath, Isabelle and HOL Light.
